text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out in the shopping district, when I see two
familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Flower! Thanks for showing me where the
greengrocer is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Happy to be of service! We've got a lot of
work to do, after all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Because sandwiches really are a versatile food.
Even the way the vegetables are cut can change
their taste.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I don't really understand what you just said,
but I always like learning new things!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Any other tips?! What else do you know about
cooking?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, a lot, I guess... But, really, the key to
cooking is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: IS?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Er, well, this is more how I cook than a general rule. It's probably of no use to you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! Please, I'd love to know! I'm the class
representative, after all! I love to learn, anything
and everything!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Anything and everything, huh? Well, okay! It's
really silly though.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I always... cook with love.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ho-hoooo! I see, I see, I seeeee! Your special
ingredient is love, is it?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I always try to make food people like. Food
that makes them happy and brings a smile to their
face.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I keep that in mind when I choose ingredients and
when I start to cook... I think it makes everything
taste even better. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Oooooh! I see, I seeeee! I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So, what you're saying is... Good cooking makes
people feel good, makes them BAKUSHIN! It's
got to have spirit in it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And I need to keep that in mind when choosing
ingredients and cooking!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! That's perfect! So, how about we choose
some ingredients that will make our friends feel
good.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then, off to the confectionery shop we go!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Aren't we making sandwiches?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate feel-good, feel-Bakushin food is, of
course, sakura mochi! My family's favorite!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go! I know a great shop!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Um, wait! Why don't we go back
and ask everyone first?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Everyone has different preferences, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In some cases, there is something more important than speed.
